faqs.question: What is Christian Leadership Academy (CLA)?
faqs.answer: The Christian Leadership Academy (CLA) is a specialized training institution dedicated to equipping believers with leadership skills rooted in biblical principles. By combining spiritual development with practical leadership training, our programs empower individuals to effectively serve and lead in their communities.

faqs.question: Are the courses free?
faqs.answer: Yes! For the first year of our program, all courses will be completely free for all students. This initiative is part of our commitment to making quality Christian leadership education accessible to everyone.

faqs.question: How long are the programs?
faqs.answer: Each level of the CLA classes takes place within a month, culminating in team presentations from the various groups assigned to participants.

faqs.question: Is this an online or physical program?
faqs.answer:
Our CLA program is offered entirely online. 
 Experience the flexibility and convenience of our virtual learning platform, where you can access course materials, engage with instructors, and connect with fellow participants from anywhere in the world.

faqs.question: What are the admission requirements?
faqs.answer:
To be eligible for our program, you must:

- Be a committed Christian
- Be willing to dedicate yourself to the coursework and requirements
- Complete our application process

Please note that additional requirements may apply. We'll be happy to guide you through the process.

faqs.question: Do I get a certificate after completion?
faqs.answer: Yes, upon successful completion of our program, you'll be awarded a certificate from Christian Leadership Academy, after passing all course assessments and meeting the necessary requirements.

faqs.question: Can I take multiple courses simultaneously?
faqs.answer: While it's possible, we recommend focusing on one program at a time to get the most out of your learning experience. Each course requires dedication and active participation.

faqs.question: What support is available for students?
faqs.answer: We provide comprehensive support including mentorship, academic guidance, prayer support, and access to our online learning resources. Our faculty and staff are committed to helping you succeed in your leadership journey.
